project:
<fileHeader companyName="" productName="CODESYS" productVersion="CODESYS V3.5 SP21" creationDateTime="" />
  <contentHeader name="PRG_Main" modificationDateTime="">
    
      
      
      
    
  
  
    
    
      
        
        
          
            
            Cycle worker
          
          
            
            Operator start button
          
        
      
        
          
            fbWorker(
    bExecute := bStart,
);

IF fbWorker.bDone THEN
    bStart := FALSE;
END_IF
